works.title: Modular and Transformable Denim Design for Multi-Size Adaptability
works.description: A component-based denim jacket and skirt integrating adjustable side-seam gussets that enable up to two numerical sizes of expansion, supporting body diversity and garment longevity without compromising silhouette.

works.title: Fruit Loops — Hemp & Organic Cotton Interlocking Ring Garment
works.venue: Hemp Impressions · LSU, Oregon State, Louisiana Old State Capitol
works.description: A top constructed from 46 snap-separating knit fabric rings in 55% hemp / 45% organic cotton, with hand-dyed adjustable jeans featuring a knit insert for multi-size adaptability. Selected from 70% acceptance rate at national juried show.

works.title: Weaving Sustainability through Zero-Waste Design: Reinventing Machine Jamdani Saree
works.venue: Creative Showcase 2025 · Gogue Performing Arts Center, Auburn University
works.description: A zero-waste dress crafted by deconstructing a machine-made Jamdani saree from Dhaka, Bangladesh. The decorative border serves as the hemline, preserving the original artistry while achieving 100% fabric use in pattern-making.
